items: Welcome by the School Board President, María Díaz-Slocum

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.

Approval of New Buildings, Modernization and Site-work Project Bid Package C, Change Order #4 for Taft Community School with Dryco

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 8.1 (Update on the Workforce Housing Project) moved to immediately after approval of agenda (item 4.1), before oral communications. President Díaz-Slocum requested this change to accommodate guest presenters with other commitments.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Moving on to content items, do I get a motion to approve the consent items?
